plan_type_rationale: Pure data-transform: read existing .coderef artifacts, compute 5 derived JSON files. No API changes, no blast radius.

phases.title: Write generate-intelligence.js script
phases.description: Author a single Node.js script that reads index.json, graph.json, complexity summary, coverage.json, and coderef-vectors.json, then writes all 5 intelligence JSON files to .coderef/intelligence/.

tasks.description: Create scripts/generate-intelligence.js that loads all 5 source artifacts and computes treemap.json, scatter.json, sankey.json, umap.json (PCA fallback), and hotspots.json
tasks.success_criteria: Script exists at scripts/generate-intelligence.js and runs without error via `node scripts/generate-intelligence.js`

tasks.description: Execute `node scripts/generate-intelligence.js` from the project root to produce the 5 output files
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 files written to .coderef/intelligence/ with non-empty content

tasks.description: Validate output files: treemap.json has children array, scatter.json array length >= 2000, sankey.json has nodes+links, umap.json has x+y per record, hotspots.json has exactly 50 entries
